ham.subject: Your Acme SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Thank you for choosing Acme SaaS for your business needs. We are writing to inform you that your current subscription plan will renew automatically on 15-May-2026.

• Plan: Premium Pro
• Next Invoice Amount: $129.99
• Billing Cycle: Monthly

If you wish to upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription, please log into your account at <URL> and update your preferences. Otherwise, your subscription will continue as is.

Should you have any questions or require assistance, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team at support@acme-saas.com.

Thank you for your continued trust in Acme SaaS.

Best regards,
The Acme SaaS Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Zoom Meeting is Scheduled – Please Join Immediately
spam.body:
Hello Team,

This is a reminder that a Microsoft Teams meeting has been scheduled for 10:00 AM UTC on 20-Apr-2026. The meeting is critical for the upcoming product launch and requires your attendance.

Meeting ID: 123-456-789
Passcode: 987654

To join the meeting, please click the link below:
<URL>

If you do not join within 15 minutes, the system will automatically lock the session. Please ensure you are prepared with all necessary documents.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best,
John Doe
Product Operations
